title: Deeplink users from an auto-matched file to the transaction [Smart Capture]
summaryBody: Opportunity for ‘delightful’ moment and quick-approval? However, do people really review this from the SC area? Or moreso from Banking? I’d imagine Banking as the SC area is very out-of-the-way, so this feels lower-priority to me
detailBody: Opportunity for ‘delightful’ moment and quick-approval? However, do people really review this from the SC area? Or moreso from Banking? I’d imagine Banking as the SC area is very out-of-the-way, so this feels lower-priority to me
